productDisplayName: Puma Men's Bluebird Blue Yellow Shoe
description: The old school silhouette of the Bluebird boasts a slim, low-cut sihouette. It is a combination of suede and leather uppers and gum rubber outsoles. Pair it with denims and round neck t-shirts for a well groomed look.Upper Suede upper with contrast stitch detailing for added structure Synthetic overlay on midfoot for further durability Central lacing for comfortable customized Fit Synthetic tongue with brand name embossed Lightly padded collar for snug fit Midsole Synthetic lining with a cushioned footbed provides all-day comfort Outsole Gum-rubber outsole for cushioning and grip
